"""
Weapon Balance Verification Test Script
Verifies all numbers from the weapon balance reference document against actual game code.
"""
import sys
import os
import math
import re

# Add server to path so we can import game modules
sys.path.insert\(0, os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(__file__\), 'server'\)\)

# We need Django settings configured minimally before importing app modules
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'config.settings'\)

# Import directly from the modules \(no Django app registry needed\)
from apps.game.state import WEAPONS
from apps.game.zombies import ZOMBIE_TYPES

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Test infrastructure
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
passed = 0
failed = 0

def check\(name, actual, expected\):
    global passed, failed
    if actual == expected:
        print\(f"  PASS: {name} = {actual}"\)
        passed += 1
    else:
        print\(f"  FAIL: {name} = {actual}, expected {expected}"\)
        failed += 1

def section\(title\):
    print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
    print\(f" {title}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*60}"\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. Zombie Health Table
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("Zombie Health Table"\)

expected_zombies = {
    'walker': {'health': 60, 'speed': 3.5, 'damage': 10, 'attack_cooldown': 1.0, 'size': 0.6, 'xp': 10},
    'runner': {'health': 40, 'speed': 7.0, 'damage': 8, 'attack_cooldown': 0.8, 'size': 0.5, 'xp': 15},
    'tank':   {'health': 200, 'speed': 2.0, 'damage': 25, 'attack_cooldown': 1.5, 'size': 0.9, 'xp': 30},
}

for ztype, expected in expected_zombies.items\(\):
    actual = ZOMBIE_TYPES[ztype]
    for key, val in expected.items\(\):
        check\(f"{ztype}.{key}", actual[key], val\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. Weapon Stats Table
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("Weapon Stats Table"\)

expected_weapons = {
    'pistol': {
        'damage': 20, 'fire_rate': 0.3, 'magazine': 12, 'reload_time': 1.5,
        'projectile_speed': 40, 'range': 30, 'pellets': 1, 'spread_angle': 0,
        'falloff': True, 'falloff_start': 15, 'falloff_min': 0.5,
    },
    'rifle': {
        'damage': 35, 'fire_rate': 0.8, 'magazine': 8, 'reload_time': 2.5,
        'projectile_speed': 60, 'range': 80, 'pellets': 1, 'spread_angle': 0,
        'falloff': False, 'falloff_start': 0, 'falloff_min': 1.0,
    },
    'uzi': {
        'damage': 10, 'fire_rate': 0.1, 'magazine': 30, 'reload_time': 1.8,
        'projectile_speed': 35, 'range': 20, 'pellets': 1, 'spread_angle': 0,
        'falloff': True, 'falloff_start': 10, 'falloff_min': 0.6,
    },
    'shotgun': {
        'damage': 8, 'fire_rate': 1.0, 'magazine': 6, 'reload_time': 2.2,
        'projectile_speed': 30, 'range': 12, 'pellets': 6, 'spread_angle': 0.35,
        'falloff': True, 'falloff_start': 5, 'falloff_min': 0.3,
    },
}

for wname, expected in expected_weapons.items\(\):
    actual = WEAPONS[wname]
    for key, val in expected.items\(\):
        check\(f"{wname}.{key}", actual[key], val\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. Damage Falloff Formula
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("Damage Falloff Formula"\)

def calc_damage\(weapon_id, distance\):
    """Replicate _calc_damage from state.py"""
    weapon = WEAPONS[weapon_id]
    base_damage = weapon['damage']
    if not weapon.get\('falloff'\):
        return base_damage
    start = weapon['falloff_start']
    if distance <= start:
        return base_damage
    max_range = weapon['range']
    t = \(distance - start\) / max\(max_range - start, 0.01\)
    t = min\(t, 1.0\)
    mult = 1.0 - t * \(1.0 - weapon['falloff_min']\)
    return round\(base_damage * mult\)

# Pistol: 20 dmg, range 30, falloff_start 15, falloff_min 0.5
print\("\\n  Pistol falloff:"\)
pistol_cases = [\(0, 20\), \(7.5, 20\), \(15, 20\), \(22.5, 15\), \(30, 10\)]
for dist, expected_dmg in pistol_cases:
    check\(f"pistol @ dist {dist}", calc_damage\('pistol', dist\), expected_dmg\)

# Rifle: 35 dmg, range 80, no falloff
print\("\\n  Rifle falloff \(none\):"\)
rifle_cases = [\(0, 35\), \(20, 35\), \(40, 35\), \(60, 35\), \(80, 35\)]
for dist, expected_dmg in rifle_cases:
    check\(f"rifle @ dist {dist}", calc_damage\('rifle', dist\), expected_dmg\)

# Uzi: 10 dmg, range 20, falloff_start 10, falloff_min 0.6
print\("\\n  Uzi falloff:"\)
uzi_cases = [\(0, 10\), \(5, 10\), \(10, 10\), \(15, 8\), \(20, 6\)]
for dist, expected_dmg in uzi_cases:
    check\(f"uzi @ dist {dist}", calc_damage\('uzi', dist\), expected_dmg\)

# Shotgun: 8 dmg per pellet, range 12, falloff_start 5, falloff_min 0.3
print\("\\n  Shotgun falloff \(per pellet\):"\)
shotgun_cases = [\(0, 8\), \(2.5, 8\), \(5, 8\), \(8.5, 4\), \(12, 2\)]
for dist, expected_dmg in shotgun_cases:
    check\(f"shotgun pellet @ dist {dist}", calc_damage\('shotgun', dist\), expected_dmg\)

# Shotgun all 6 pellets hit
print\("\\n  Shotgun falloff \(all 6 pellets\):"\)
shotgun_total_cases = [\(0, 48\), \(2.5, 48\), \(5, 48\), \(8.5, 24\), \(12, 12\)]
for dist, expected_total in shotgun_total_cases:
    pellet_dmg = calc_damage\('shotgun', dist\)
    total = pellet_dmg * WEAPONS['shotgun']['pellets']
    check\(f"shotgun total @ dist {dist}", total, expected_total\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. Shots to Kill
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("Shots to Kill"\)

zombie_hp = {
    'Walker': ZOMBIE_TYPES['walker']['health'],   # 60
    'Runner': ZOMBIE_TYPES['runner']['health'],    # 40
    'Tank':   ZOMBIE_TYPES['tank']['health'],      # 200
}

def shots_to_kill\(dmg_per_shot, hp\):
    return math.ceil\(hp / dmg_per_shot\)

# Point blank \(dist=0\)
print\("\\n  Point blank \(dist=0\):"\)
pb = {
    'Pistol': calc_damage\('pistol', 0\),                                    # 20
    'Rifle':  calc_damage\('rifle', 0\),                                     # 35
    'Uzi':    calc_damage\('uzi', 0\),                                       # 10
    'Shotgun': calc_damage\('shotgun', 0\) * WEAPONS['shotgun']['pellets'],  # 48
}

expected_pb = {
    'Pistol':  {'Walker': 3, 'Runner': 2, 'Tank': 10},
    'Rifle':   {'Walker': 2, 'Runner': 2, 'Tank': 6},
    'Uzi':     {'Walker': 6, 'Runner': 4, 'Tank': 20},
    'Shotgun': {'Walker': 2, 'Runner': 1, 'Tank': 5},
}

for weapon, zombies in expected_pb.items\(\):
    dmg = pb[weapon]
    for zname, exp_stk in zombies.items\(\):
        actual_stk = shots_to_kill\(dmg, zombie_hp[zname]\)
        check\(f"{weapon} vs {zname} \(pb, dmg={dmg}\)", actual_stk, exp_stk\)

# Mid range
print\("\\n  Mid range:"\)
mid = {
    'Pistol':  \('pistol', 22.5, 15\),
    'Rifle':   \('rifle', 40, 35\),
    'Uzi':     \('uzi', 15, 8\),
    'Shotgun': \('shotgun', 8.5, None\),  # total computed
}

expected_mid = {
    'Pistol':  {'Walker': 4, 'Runner': 3, 'Tank': 14},
    'Rifle':   {'Walker': 2, 'Runner': 2, 'Tank': 6},
    'Uzi':     {'Walker': 8, 'Runner': 5, 'Tank': 25},
    'Shotgun': {'Walker': 3, 'Runner': 2, 'Tank': 9},
}

for weapon, \(wid, dist, _expected_dmg\) in mid.items\(\):
    if weapon == 'Shotgun':
        dmg = calc_damage\(wid, dist\) * WEAPONS[wid]['pellets']
    else:
        dmg = calc_damage\(wid, dist\)
    for zname, exp_stk in expected_mid[weapon].items\(\):
        actual_stk = shots_to_kill\(dmg, zombie_hp[zname]\)
        check\(f"{weapon}@{dist} vs {zname} \(dmg={dmg}\)", actual_stk, exp_stk\)

# Max range
print\("\\n  Max range:"\)
maxr = {
    'Pistol':  \('pistol', 30, 10\),
    'Rifle':   \('rifle', 80, 35\),
    'Uzi':     \('uzi', 20, 6\),
    'Shotgun': \('shotgun', 12, None\),
}

expected_max = {
    'Pistol':  {'Walker': 6, 'Runner': 4, 'Tank': 20},
    'Rifle':   {'Walker': 2, 'Runner': 2, 'Tank': 6},
    'Uzi':     {'Walker': 10, 'Runner': 7, 'Tank': 34},
    'Shotgun': {'Walker': 5, 'Runner': 4, 'Tank': 17},
}

for weapon, \(wid, dist, _expected_dmg\) in maxr.items\(\):
    if weapon == 'Shotgun':
        dmg = calc_damage\(wid, dist\) * WEAPONS[wid]['pellets']
    else:
        dmg = calc_damage\(wid, dist\)
    for zname, exp_stk in expected_max[weapon].items\(\):
        actual_stk = shots_to_kill\(dmg, zombie_hp[zname]\)
        check\(f"{weapon}@{dist} vs {zname} \(dmg={dmg}\)", actual_stk, exp_stk\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. DPS Calculations
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("DPS Calculations"\)

dps_expected = {
    'Pistol': {'weapon_id': 'pistol', 'dps': 66.7, 'mag_duration': 3.3, 'total_dmg': 240},
    'Rifle':  {'weapon_id': 'rifle',  'dps': 43.8, 'mag_duration': 5.6, 'total_dmg': 280},
    'Uzi':    {'weapon_id': 'uzi',    'dps': 100.0, 'mag_duration': 2.9, 'total_dmg': 300},
    'Shotgun': {'weapon_id': 'shotgun', 'dps': 48.0, 'mag_duration': 5.0, 'total_dmg': 288},
}

for name, exp in dps_expected.items\(\):
    w = WEAPONS[exp['weapon_id']]
    pellets = w['pellets']
    dmg_per_shot = w['damage'] * pellets
    fire_rate = w['fire_rate']
    magazine = w['magazine']

    dps = round\(dmg_per_shot / fire_rate, 1\)
    mag_duration = round\(\(magazine - 1\) * fire_rate, 1\)
    total_dmg = dmg_per_shot * magazine

    check\(f"{name} DPS", dps, exp['dps']\)
    check\(f"{name} mag_duration", mag_duration, exp['mag_duration']\)
    check\(f"{name} total_mag_damage", total_dmg, exp['total_dmg']\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. Client constants.js cross-check
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
section\("Client constants.js Cross-Check"\)

js_path = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(__file__\), 'shared', 'constants.js'\)
with open\(js_path, 'r'\) as f:
    js_content = f.read\(\)

# Map JS key names to server key names
key_mapping = {
    'damage': 'damage',
    'fireRate': 'fire_rate',
    'magazine': 'magazine',
    'reloadTime': 'reload_time',
    'projectileSpeed': 'projectile_speed',
    'range': 'range',
    'pellets': 'pellets',
    'spreadAngle': 'spread_angle',
}

# Parse JS WEAPONS object manually
# Extract each weapon block
for weapon_name in ['pistol', 'rifle', 'uzi', 'shotgun']:
    # Find the weapon block in JS
    pattern = rf'{weapon_name}:\\s*\\{{\([^}}]+\)\\}}'
    match = re.search\(pattern, js_content, re.DOTALL\)
    if not match:
        print\(f"  FAIL: Could not find {weapon_name} in constants.js"\)
        failed += 1
        continue

    block = match.group\(1\)

    for js_key, server_key in key_mapping.items\(\):
        # Extract value from JS
        val_pattern = rf'{js_key}:\\s*\([0-9.]+\)'
        val_match = re.search\(val_pattern, block\)
        if not val_match:
            print\(f"  FAIL: Could not find {weapon_name}.{js_key} in constants.js"\)
            failed += 1
            continue

        js_val_str = val_match.group\(1\)
        # Parse as int or float
        if '.' in js_val_str:
            js_val = float\(js_val_str\)
        else:
            js_val = int\(js_val_str\)

        server_val = WEAPONS[weapon_name][server_key]

        check\(f"JS vs Server: {weapon_name}.{js_key}", js_val, server_val\)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Summary
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
print\(f" SUMMARY"\)
print\(f"{'='*60}"\)
print\(f"  Total:  {passed + failed}"\)
print\(f"  Passed: {passed}"\)
print\(f"  Failed: {failed}"\)
if failed == 0:
    print\(f"\\n  ALL TESTS PASSED"\)
else:
    print\(f"\\n  SOME TESTS FAILED"\)
print\(f"{'='*60}\\n"\)

sys.exit\(1 if failed else 0\)
PYEOF)

from server.apps.game.state import GameRoom
room = GameRoom\('test'\)
p = room.add_player\('p1', 'Test'\)
# Put player near a car
cars = [o for o in room.obstacles if o.lootable and not o.looted]
if cars:
    car = cars[0]
    p.x = car.x + 1
    p.y = car.y
    p.vx = 0
    p.vy = 0
    result = room._find_nearest_interactable\(p\)
    print\(f'Nearest interactable: {result}'\)
    
    # Test action hold
    room.process_action_hold\('p1', True\)
    print\(f'Action holding: {p.action_holding}'\)
    
    # Tick
    room.tick\(0.05\)
    print\(f'Action progress: {p.action_progress}'\)
    print\(f'Action target: {p.action_target_type} {p.action_target_id}'\)
else:
    print\('No lootable cars'\)

# Test extraction zone proximity
if room.extraction_zones:
    ez = room.extraction_zones[0]
    p.x = ez.x
    p.y = ez.y
    result2 = room._find_nearest_interactable\(p\)
    print\(f'At extraction zone: {result2}'\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
" 2>&1)

import random
random.seed\(42\)
from server.apps.game.state import GameRoom
room = GameRoom\('test'\)
p = room.add_player\('p1', 'Test'\)
cars = [o for o in room.obstacles if o.lootable and not o.looted]
if cars:
    car = cars[0]
    p.x = car.x + 1
    p.y = car.y
    p.vx = 0
    p.vy = 0
    result = room._find_nearest_interactable\(p\)
    print\(f'Nearest interactable: {result}'\)
    room.process_action_hold\('p1', True\)
    room.tick\(0.05\)
    print\(f'Action progress: {p.action_progress:.2f}'\)
    print\(f'Action target: {p.action_target_type}'\)

if room.extraction_zones:
    ez = room.extraction_zones[0]
    p.x = ez.x
    p.y = ez.y
    result2 = room._find_nearest_interactable\(p\)
    print\(f'At extraction zone: {result2}'\)

# Test weapon unlock
from server.apps.game.state import _roll_loot, CHEST_LOOT_TABLE
loot, dur = _roll_loot\(CHEST_LOOT_TABLE\)
print\(f'Rolled loot: {loot}, duration: {dur}'\)

# Test _give_loot
events = room._give_loot\(p, {'type': 'weapon_unlock', 'weapon_id': 'rifle'}\)
print\(f'After unlock: weapons={p.unlocked_weapons}, reserve={p.weapon_ammo_reserve}'\)
print\(f'Events: {events}'\)

# Test switch weapon
room.process_switch_weapon\('p1', 'rifle'\)
print\(f'Switched to rifle: weapon={p.weapon_id}, ammo={p.ammo}'\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
" 2>&1)
